welcomeSub: Ask anything about farming — crops, pests, fertilizer, government schemes, weather...
chatHistoryEmpty: No chats yet. Start a conversation!

hints.hintName: Type your name, or tap 🎤 to speak it.
hints.hintOtp: Enter the OTP sent to your phone, then tap Verify.
hints.hintLocation: Tell me your village or district so I can give local advice.
hints.hintCrop: Tell me which crops you grow, like wheat or rice.
hints.guide1: 🖼️ Tap the photo icon to upload a crop photo for disease check.
hints.guide2: 🎤 Tap the mic to ask your question by speaking.
hints.guide3: 🔊 Tap Listen on any answer to hear it aloud.
hints.guide4: 💬 Type any farming question and tap send.
